2025-26 Loyola Marymount Lions Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 15-17 (6-12, 9th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Stan Johnson

PS/G: 74.2 (226th of 365)

PA/G: 72.1 (126th of 365)

SRS: 0.76 (141st of 365)

SOS: 1.18 (123rd of 365)

ORtg: 107.0 (237th of 365)

DRtg: 103.8 (102nd of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000
